__inputs.name: DS_API_PLATFORM VM
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Any Prometheus-compatible datasource containing node_exporter metrics.

targets.expr:
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_symbol_error_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) + 
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_port_errors_received_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_port_constraint_errors_received_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_port_constraint_errors_transmitted_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_local_link_integrity_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_excessive_buffer_overrun_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_port_receive_switch_relay_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(instance) (irate(node_infiniband_port_receive_remote_physical_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval]))

max by (instance, device) (
    (count by (instance, device) (node_infiniband_physical_state_id{instance=~"$instance"} == 2) > bool 0)
        or 
    (count by (instance, device) (node_infiniband_physical_state_id{instance=~"$instance"} == 6) > bool 0)
)

max by (device, port, hca_type, firmware_version) (
  node_infiniband_rate_bytes_per_second{instance=~"$instance"} * 8
  * (node_infiniband_physical_state_id{instance=~"$instance"} == bool 5)
  * on(region, instance, device) group_left(hca_type, firmware_version)
  node_infiniband_info
)

sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_symbol_error_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) + 
sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_port_errors_received_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_port_constraint_errors_received_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_port_constraint_errors_transmitted_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_local_link_integrity_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_excessive_buffer_overrun_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_port_receive_switch_relay_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval])) +
sum by(device) (irate(node_infiniband_port_receive_remote_physical_errors_total{instance=~"$instance"}[$__interval]))
